procedure: Group-disjoint holdout pinned for reproducible evaluation. Groups are (reference[:60] | composition) keys with 1-3 rows each, sampled with numpy RandomState(42) over the key-sorted eligible pool, stratified by brittleness bin with row targets ductile>=8, brittle>=6, unknown>=2. Selected once on 2026-06-10 and frozen; do not regenerate when data is added, append new groups instead.
